name: ENS Resolution
description: Resolve an ENS name (.eth domain) to an Ethereum address — and do a forward+reverse roundtrip to defend against spoofing. Foundation for human-readable agent addressing on L1.

steps.description: Compute namehash(name) per EIP-137: recursive keccak256 over label hashes.
registry.resolver(node) returns resolverAddress. If 0x0, name is unresolvable.
resolver.name(reverseNamehash(address)) returns name. Reject if mismatch.

rule.primary: Agent submits {name}. Validator independently resolves name -> address and confirms it equals the agent's wallet, then reverse-resolves agent's address -> name and confirms it matches.
rule.fallback: Agent owns >=1 prior SBT credential AND has any ENS reverse record set on their wallet.
